title: Hopite Modpack
description: A modpack that enhance your gameplay experience on Hoplite, including in-game voice chat.
body:
Hoplite Modpack
---
Hoplite Modpack is a modpack to enhance your gameplay experience, including in-game voice chat. 

Modpack Features
---
- Proximity voice chat for Minecraft with a variety of features.
- Optimizes in the Minecraft network stack. Reduces memory and CPU usage.
- Prevents the rendering of things you cannot see to improve FPS.
- Adds additional optimizations for Minecraft users who have a NVIDIA GPU.
- Fixes random memory leaks found within vanilla Minecraft.
- Adds features found in Optifine to this modpack, like particle and animation settings.

FAQ
---
<details>
<summary>What's Hoplite and where can I play it?</summary>

Hoplite is a Minecraft server created and owned by [SpeedSilver](https://www.youtube.com/@SpeedSilver). Hoplite offers innovative new games such as Battle Royale and Duels. All of the gamemodes found on Hoplite, contain custom items referred to as "Legendary Items". These are unique custom model items, that have special abilities to create a unique combat experience. You can play Hoplite today @ hoplite.gg.


</details>
